events.text: Assessment written to `/app/answer.json`: **fail / critical risk**. Inadequate bracing/kickers during an active pour is an imminent collapse hazard under ACI 347's lateral-pressure design requirements — work must stop, an engineer must verify the bracing design, and additional kickers/anchorage must be installed and reinspected before the pour resumes.
